headline: Bank of America (BAC) Rallies With Big Banks, Is It Still Trading At A Discount?
summary: Bank of America stock reacts to sector rally and earnings optimism Bank of America (BAC) shares pushed to a record high on July 6, gaining 2% as investors responded to a sector wide rally in large banks ahead of the June quarter earnings season. The move comes as Q2 earnings estimates for Bank of America have been revised higher in recent months, with expectations tied to core banking and trading performance in a backdrop of higher interest rates that currently supports sentiment toward large...

headline: Bank Of America Corp (BAC) Proved To Be One Of Jim Cramer’s Weakest Stocks
summary: We recently published Jim Cramer’s Biggest Losers: 10 Stocks That Just Didn’t Work Out. Bank Of America Corp (NYSE:BAC) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. Banking giant Bank Of America Corp (NYSE:BAC)’s shares are up by 20.7% over the past year and by 5% year-to-date. Citi discussed the firm on June 23rd […]

headline: Shopify shares climb as BofA lifts rating to Buy on agentic commerce shift
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America reinstated coverage of Shopify with a Buy rating and a $150 price objective, arguing the company is positioned to benefit from the shift toward AI-driven agentic commerce.

content.title: Shopify shares climb as BofA lifts rating to Buy on agentic commerce shift
content.summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America reinstated coverage of Shopify with a Buy rating and a $150 price objective, arguing the company is positioned to benefit from the shift toward AI-driven agentic commerce.

headline: BofA reinstates Figma at Buy, says AI turning into a ’growth catalyst’
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America reinstated coverage of Figma with a Buy rating and a $30 price target on Tuesday, arguing that fears over generative AI disrupting the design software company have been overdone and that the stock's 85% decline from its 52-week high presents an attractive entry point.

content.title: BofA reinstates Figma at Buy, says AI turning into a ’growth catalyst’

summary: The financial-technology stock was the biggest riser in the S&P 500 ahead of the open, despite broader tech weakness.

headline: ‘Cheap but fundamentally challenged’: BofA reinstates Adobe at Underperform
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America on Tuesday reinstated coverage of Adobe with an Underperform rating and a $190 price objective, arguing that generative AI is eroding the software maker’s competitive position even though its stock trades near the bottom of its historical valuation range.

headline: Fiserv discusses potential sale of debit payments network with major US banks (FISV)
summary: Large lenders explore acquisition of payments infrastructureFiserv (NASDAQ:FISV) has been in discussions with several leading US banks, including JPMorgan (NYSE:JPM) and Bank of America (NYSE:BAC), regarding the possible sale of its debit payments network business, according to a source familiar with the matter.
